[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11011011 6
1 11110111 7
2 00011101 4
3 00011001 3
4 10000110 3
5 00011101 4
6 10100100 3
7 01110101 5

01 10 00100100 2
12 21 01000000 1
23 32 11000010 3
34 43 00010100 2
45 54 00011000 2
56 65 00000000 a
67 76 00000100 1
70 07 00000100 1

02 20 10000000 1
13 31 01110101 5 match 7
24 42 00001000 1
35 53 00010001 2
46 64 00000100 1
57 75 00011001 3 match 3
60 06 10000100 2
71 17 00010101 3

03 30 10100100 3 match 6
14 41 00010100 2
25 52 00001000 1
36 63 10000110 3 match 4
47 74 00011100 3
50 05 00000000 a
61 16 00000100 1
72 27 00001000 1

04 40 00000100 1
15 51 00010001 2
26 62 10000010 2
37 73 00010101 3
